data.description:
## Context

The 2026-04-28 manual ruleset adjustments on this repo's GitHub Ruleset enabled (item #2) Require code scanning results with CodeQL — Security alerts: High or higher, Alerts: Errors and (item #3) Require code quality results — Severity: Errors. These rules require CI to emit code-scanning-API-compatible results (CodeQL SARIF for security; SARIF or equivalent for code quality) before they can be turned on without permanently blocking PRs. Until the CI emits these results, the rules cannot be enabled. Epic 4e55-a6ba (PR-merge mode + enforcement-strategy config) explicitly defers these two ruleset rules to this follow-on epic, with provision-ruleset.sh's knob set unimplemented for them. This epic adds the CodeQL job, the code-quality scanning + SARIF upload step, and extends provision-ruleset.sh with the require_codeql and require_code_quality knobs so the rules can be enabled on projects that opt in.

## Success Criteria

- A CodeQL job is added to .github/workflows/ci.yml that runs on every PR, scans the code, and uploads results to GitHub's code-scanning API.
- A code-quality job (or step) emits SARIF output from existing lint/static-analysis tooling (ruff for Python, actionlint for workflows, shellcheck for bash) and uploads via github/codeql-action/upload-sarif so the Require code quality results rule has data to gate against.
- provision-ruleset.sh extended with require_codeql (boolean) and require_code_quality (boolean) knobs that toggle those Ruleset rules; defaults to false on new projects.
- This project's GitHub Ruleset has Require CodeQL and Require code quality rules enabled (matching the 2026-04-28 manual adjustments) — verified in-session via gh api repos/.../rulesets.
- A deliberate test PR with a known CodeQL-detectable security issue (e.g., insecure deserialization pattern) blocks merge until the issue is fixed — verified in-session.

## Dependencies

Relates_to epic 4e55-a6ba (PR-merge mode + enforcement-strategy config) — this epic adds the rule knobs that 4e55-a6ba explicitly deferred. Not a hard blocker — 4e55-a6ba ships without these rules; this epic adds them later.

## Approach

To be defined during /dso:brainstorm — this is a placeholder epic created during the 2026-04-28 brainstorm of the PR-mode + CI-parity epic group. Carries scrutiny:pending tag until brainstormed.

### Planning Intelligence Log

- Placeholder epic — full Planning Intelligence Log will be populated when /dso:brainstorm runs against this epic.
data.title: Required CodeQL + code-quality scanning gates: CI emission and ruleset knobs
